name: patch
description: Apply unified diff to files. Supports single-file mode (target+diff) and multi-file mode (files array). Multi-file mode uses per-file atomicity: each file is independently applied in memory — if any hunk fails, that file is skipped (rolled back), while other files succeed. Use dry_run=true to preview. Returns: multi-file results with === section separators.

target.description: Single target file path (v1 compat, use with diff)

diff.description: Single diff content (v1 compat, use with target)

files.description: Multi-file diff array. Each item has path and diff.

dry_run.description: If true, preview changes without modifying files.
